  "findings": [
    "The presence and routing of the fixture vent path behind the finished wall cannot be verified visually."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Verify the venting arrangement behind the wall via architectural drawings, rough-in photos, or physical inspection (e.g., using a borescope or tracing the vent stack in the attic/roof)."
  ],
  "rationale": "While the visible under-sink P-trap and sanitary tee connection appear correct, the code-required vent path behind the finished wall is completely concealed. Without documentation, photos of the rough-in stage, or physical verification of a dry vent or wet vent connection, compliance with IPC venting regulations cannot be confirmed.",

    "IPC Section 901.2 (Venting required)",
    "IPC Section 909.1 (Distance of trap from vent)"
  ]
